# 🗃️ Tag <kbd>Model</kbd>

> A label that can be attached to tasks and projects for categorization.

**Defined in:** `showcase.zmodel`

---

<details>
<summary>Declaration · <code>showcase.zmodel</code></summary>

```prisma
model Tag {
    id       String    @id @default(cuid())
    name     String    @unique @length(1, 50)
    color    String?   @meta('doc:example', '#3b82f6')
    tasks    Task[]
    projects Project[]
}
```

</details>

> **On this page:** [Fields](#fields) · [Relationships](#relationships) · [Validation Rules](#validation-rules)
